LINDA E. SHRYACK, TEL. NO. (707) 927-6863, COURT REPORTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendants Philip Morris USA Incorporated and R.J. Reynolds Tobacco Company'S Motion To Quash Plaintiffs' Amended Notices Of Taking Depositions - EACH DEPOSITION IS LIMITED TO 18 HOURS WHICH IS 6 HOURS FOR 3 DAYS, UNLESS THE PARTIES AGREE OTHERWISE. THE LIMITATIONS STATED IN THE DEPOSITION NOTICES THAT THERE WILL NOT BE REASKING OF QUESTIONS EXCEPT FOR FOUNDATIONAL PURPOSES IS NOW CONFIRMED AS A COURT ORDER. WITNESSES NEED NOT PREPARE IN ADVANCE. IF THE WITNESSES CANNOT ANSWER QUESTIONS, THE PARTIES ARE OBLIGATED TO MEET AND CONFER AFTER THE DEPOSITION. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Linda E. Shryack, CSR # 12104
